title: RCM softmod (v1/Erista)
_note: PLACEHOLDER guide. Verify all payload and tool links before release.

steps.title: Before you start
steps.body: This path is for **unpatched v1 (Erista)** systems that can use RCM payload injection.

steps.title: Prepare your SD card
steps.body: Copy the required files to your SD card as directed by the official guide.

steps.title: Inject payload
steps.body: Enter RCM mode and inject your payload with your launcher tool.
